notes.title: Architecture boundary
notes.text: EWS, CAS, FEM, BDC and later BDC generations are generation/fitted-hardware dependent. No procedure is inherited solely from a shared family label.

notes.title: Variant policy
notes.text: Keyed, slot-key, proximity and keyless routes remain separate; non-applicable routes require generation evidence before closure.

notes.title: Evidence needed
notes.text: Record VIN/build date, chassis code, key and module part numbers, UK RHD locations, tool/version and successful job result.
